repository_ssim: St. Catherine's Monastery of the Sinai
paracontent_tesim: I, Jirmānūs Bishop of the Holy Mount Sinai, state that / this book is endowed to the Holy Mount Sinai. Whoever transgresses and takes it out from [its] place will be banned
اقول انا جرمانوس اسقف طور سينا / المقدس ان هذا الكتاب / وقف على طور سينا المقدس فمن / تعدا واخرجه من الموضع / يكون محروم
full_text_tesim: I, Jirmānūs Bishop of the Holy Mount Sinai, state that / this book is endowed to the Holy Mount Sinai. Whoever transgresses and takes it out from [its] place will be banned
